input:
It was natural, therefore, that Muhammad should think of doing as other boys did. He is quoted by ʿAlī ibn Abī Ṭālib, his cousin, to have said: I never thought about taking part in what the people who lived in ignorance were organizing in the way of entertainment except on two nights. On both occasions, God protected me against evil. One night I said to one of my fellow shepherds: “Would you kindly look after my sheep to give me a chance to go down to Makkah and attend a social function like other boys do?” He was willing to do that.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 2: The Early Years

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 2: The Early Years

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Pre-teens, light brown skin, slender build, short stature. Hair messy, dark brown. Always shown in silhouette, face never visible. Distinguished by youthful energy and simple shepherd's attire.

characters.name: Anonymous Shepherds of Makkah
characters.appearance: Pre-teens to early teens, light brown skin, slender build, short stature. Hair messy, dark brown. Wearing simple white or beige thobe with a brown cloak draped over shoulders, off-white or beige head covering. Leather sandals. Friendly, curious expression.

output.moral_lesson: It's natural to be curious and want to join others, but it's also important to remember what's right and wrong.
output.narrative_text: When Muhammad was a young boy, he would join his friends in going to social gatherings. But one night, he asked a fellow shepherd to watch his sheep so he could go to Makkah and join the celebration.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown in silhouette, not visible. Fellow shepherd shown with full face, friendly expression. A natural and fun scene for children.

output.image_prompt: Children's digital painting. A young boy in simple shepherd's attire, shown in silhouette standing in front of a cluster of sheep, against a warm sunset background in ancient Makkah. A friendly smiling boy, dressed in a similar simple outfit, standing behind the silhouette, looking back at the viewer. A few palm trees in the background. Medium shot, eye level. Warm pastel palette. No modern objects.
